import { Badge, Tabs, TabItem, Card, CardGrid, LinkCard, Aside, Steps } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

<Badge text="plannotator-compound" variant="note" /> <Badge text="48 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Optional Plannotator extras (compound planning analysis, setup-goal, visual explainer). Requires the core Plannotator skills and CLI above. Do not install from the repo root (`backnotprop/plannotator`) — that path exposes maintainer-only skills (pierre-guard, release-plannotator, review-renovate, update-deps), not the user-facing extras.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add backnotprop/plannotator/apps/skills --skill plannotator-compound --skill plannotator-setup-goal --skill plannotator-visual-explainer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/plannotator-compound`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/plannotator-compound.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add backnotprop/plannotator/apps/skills --skill plannotator-compound --skill plannotator-setup-goal --skill plannotator-visual-explainer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Optional Plannotator extras (compound planning analysis, setup-goal, visual explainer). Requires the core Plannotator skills and CLI above. Do not install from the repo root (`backnotprop/plannotator`) — that path exposes maintainer-only skills (pierre-guard, release-plannotator, review-renovate, update-deps), not the user-facing extras.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Optional Plannotator extra for compound planning analysis. Part of user-facing extras in apps/skills (not root). Complements core Plannotator skills for compound/structured planning workflows, goal setup, and visual explanations of plans. Installed as optional extras via the curated apps/skills subpath.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add backnotprop/plannotator/apps/skills --skill plannotator-compound --skill plannotator-setup-goal --skill plannotator-visual-explainer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named (group). Notes: requires core Plannotator skills/CLI; do not use root path.

## Upstream Maintainer

backnotprop (github.com/backnotprop/plannotator/apps/skills). Skills under apps/skills/extra per structure. Config explicitly warns: do not install from repo root (exposes maintainer-only skills: pierre-guard, release-plannotator, review-renovate, update-deps). Use the apps/skills path for user-facing extras. Requires core Plannotator skills/CLI first.

## Comparable Alternatives

Core Plannotator skills (required prerequisite); other planning/roadmap or goal-setting skills (e.g. create-implementation-plan, brainstorm variants); general agent planning or visual explainer skills; native agent task decomposition without Plannotator-specific extras.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
